Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: THOMAS PURTELL, ESQ., 415.722.6291, FOR PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER DE LA CAMPA.
JENNY LI, ESQ., 510.817.0467, FOR DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BASEBALL ASSOCIATES LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BASEBALL ASSOCIATES LLC'S Motion For Sanctions Payable To The Court is denied. Plaintiff's declaration demonstrates good cause for failing to pay the sanctions. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion For Sanctions Payable To The Court
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BASEBALL ASSOCIATES LLC's Motion For Sanctions Payable To The Court is continued to December 11, 2013, to give the opposing party the chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers immediately with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling: Defendant SAN FRANCISCO BASEBALL ASSOCIATES LLC'S Motion to Compel Plaintiff to Answer Defendant's Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things, Set One: and Demand for Statement of Damages is GRANTED.
